query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "alayaworld: long-horizon and playable video world generation" computer science
rationale: The paper satisfies criterion (a) by measuring the same core mechanism ("long-horizon" capability) in the same domain (computer science/AI), even though it focuses on the reasoning/CoT aspect rather than the specific video generation mechanism of the user's target paper. It also fits criterion (b) as it provides an empirical baseline for the "long-horizon" variable within the computer science domain, which is essential for a literature review on extending long-horizon generation systems.
